title: Humility SE
description:
Another mod from Humility series. 
This one adds some simple, balanced enchants.
body:
# HumilitySE ## Humility - Simple Enchants ### Description This is a small mod that adds couple easy to understand enchantments.

### Added enchants:
Frost (1 - 2) - opposite of Fire Aspect, slows mobs on impact as well as extinguishes them.
(Obtainable through enchanting table)
Destruction (1 - 3) - Mine blocks in 3x3x{level} radius, but none of the blocks will drop.
When alongside Silk Touch there will be a chance for the blocks to drop (increased by destruction enchantment level).
(Obtainable through enchanting table)

### Added Curses:
Curse of Decay - Mobs always drop rotten flesh instead of other kinds of meats.
(Obtainable through, low bookshelf count, enchanting table and from various dungeons)


Checkout my other mod:
HumilityAFM:  [](https://github.com/MikiP98/HumilityAFM)  [](https://modrinth.com/mod/humility-afm)
